import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import axios from 'axios' function MaterialList() { const [material, setmaterial] = useState() useEffect(() => { axios .get('http://localhost:8081') .then(res => console.log(res)) .catch(err => console.log(err)); }, []) return(
Material ID Name Description Unit of Measure Price per Unit Recent Vendor
) } export default MaterialList
